hero.headline: Simple, Transparent Pricing
hero.subHeadline: Secure your space with predictable costs. Choose the tier that matches your monthly scan volume.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: Perfect for single gates and small communities.

pro.name: Professional
pro.description: For high-traffic schools and busy compounds.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: Custom limits for mass events and stadium access.

q1.question: What happens if we exceed our monthly scan limit?
q1.answer: Scanning will never stop at the gate. If you exceed your limit, we simply bill you for the overage at the end of the month, or prompt you to upgrade if it becomes a regular occurrence.

q2.question: Is the Scanner App included in the price?
q2.answer: Yes, unlimited downloads of the Scanner App for your security team are included in all tiers.

q3.question: Do you need special hardware?
q3.answer: No! Our Scanner App works on any standard Android smartphone, saving you thousands in proprietary hardware costs.

q4.question: Can I integrate GateFlow with my existing property management software?
q4.answer: Absolutely. The Pro and Enterprise tiers include full API access and webhooks for seamless integration.
